title: Dixie Vintage Christmas Party
description: A festive swing paradise with MIND THE TRAD, featuring Christmas celebration songs and vintage dancing at Jamboree.
descriptionEn: A festive swing paradise with MIND THE TRAD, featuring Christmas celebration songs and vintage dancing at Jamboree.
descriptionBg: Празничен суинг рай с MIND THE TRAD, включващ коледни песни и винтидж танци в Jamboree.
body:
Dixie Vintage Christmas Party with MIND THE TRAD!

Festive swing paradise at this incredible venue as MIND THE TRAD bring a sack full of magic with a sound encompassing swing and contemporary jazz.

The London based, New Orleans influenced band, will be creating an extra vintage event this December. Led by the vocalist Ami Oprenova covered in beads and glitter, together with the handsome boys wearing Dixie hats you are in for a Christmas treat! 

There will be an incredible homemade cake stall as well as a professional Vintage Dance Teacher showing us the moves, we will be stomping away at the marvellous Jamboree stage room! 

This evening will be full of Christmas celebration songs!!! 
A night Not to be missed!!! 
Doors 7pm/ Music 8pm
Adv £5 / Door £7
bodyEn:
Festive swing paradise at this incredible venue as MIND THE TRAD bring a sack full of magic with a sound encompassing swing and contemporary jazz. The London-based, New Orleans-influenced band will be creating an extra vintage event this December.

Led by Ami Oprenova, you're in for a Christmas treat with celebration songs, a homemade cake stall, and professional vintage dance teachers! Stomp away at the marvelous Jamboree stage room.

Adv £5 / Door £7
bodyBg:
Празничен суинг рай в невероятния клуб Jamboree! MIND THE TRAD носят магическо звучене, обхващащо суинг и съвременен джаз. Базираната в Лондон група, повлияна от Ню Орлиънс, ще създаде едно истинско винтидж събитие този декември.

Водени от Ами Опренова, ви очаква коледно изживяване с празнични песни, щанд за домашни торти и професионални учители по винтидж танци! Елате да танцувате в прекрасната зала на Jamboree.

Билети: £5 предварително / £7 на място
